ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the exam (e.g., mid-term, final, practice) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exam */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exam */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exam was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exam */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exam was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exam is active and can be scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_questions" (
  "exam_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam-question pair */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the question is assigned to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "question_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the question in the exam */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the question to the exam */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was assigned to the exam */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, administrator, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the exam */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the user */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exam was submitted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_Analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question analytics entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score obtained by users for the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "correct_answer_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the question was answered correctly */,
  "incorrect_answer_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the question was answered incorrectly */,
  "average_response_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to answer the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the analytics entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
